summary: R2 evidence confirms the 1440x900 desktop first screen shows the recovered map and legend, but the smaller viewport evidence does not yet support the same claim. The 1280x720 screenshot still shows task rail and player guidance without the map or map legend in the first viewport, and a follow-up 1280x800 probe timed out waiting for the map legend locator. This remains validation evidence only and does not approve M7 content lock.

tests_run.result: Shared worktree still contains the R1 task/state JSON updates, the web-shell E2E patch, the replacement-start handoff, and the two screenshot evidence files.
Listed active tasks; M7-UX-RECOVERY-VALIDATION-001 remained the current in-progress replacement task.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-UX-RECOVERY-VALIDATION-001

tests_run.result: No whitespace or patch formatting issues.
Vite web build completed successfully with a non-blocking chunk-size warning.
Playwright chromium suite passed: 26 tests, 26 passed.
Format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks all passed.
The smaller-viewport screenshot is nonblank but does not show the map or map legend in the first viewport.
The desktop screenshot is nonblank and shows the map alongside the task rail.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec node -e viewport probe at 1280x800 against apps/web/dist
tests_run.result: locator.boundingBox timed out waiting for getByLabel('Map legend'), indicating the smaller viewport probe still did not surface the map legend.

decisions.result: Kept the scope limited to validation evidence. No content-lock approval was made.
Classified the current result as PARTIAL because the smaller viewport evidence cannot yet prove first-screen map and legend visibility.

risks: DOM-only checks can pass while the smaller viewport still hides the map and legend below the fold.
Routing this task as REVIEW would overstate the evidence and repeat the product-owner complaint.
blockers: The required smaller-viewport first-screen evidence is not satisfied. 1280x720 screenshot evidence shows task rail and player guidance without the map or map legend in view.
A follow-up 1280x800 probe also failed to surface the map legend locator, so the current UI/layout cannot yet prove the first-screen map claim at a smaller viewport.
Do not reopen or approve M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 from this validation task.
requested_action: Lead should keep the task in blocked/partial validation state and keep M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 closed. QA should not accept this as REVIEW until a smaller viewport can prove actual first-screen map and legend visibility.
